title: Can You Guess The Actor From Their Breakout Role Alone?
dek: No name, no photo until you reveal it — just the part that made them a star.

items.quote: I played a teenage archer forced to fight to the death on live television — and it made me a global star.
I fell for a stranger while feeling lost and jet-lagged in Tokyo, and critics couldn't stop talking about it.
I fell in love with a girl in a rowboat one summer, and spent the rest of my career being compared to it.
I traded a dead-end job for a jetpack and a talking raccoon, and suddenly I was a leading man.
I transformed into a real killer to play one on screen, and it won me an Oscar.
I turned a Beverly Hills shop assistant's worst day into the role that made me a movie star overnight.

related.title: Can You Guess The Movie From Its Most Famous Quote?
6 Actors Who Turned Down Legendary Movie Roles
